verified.notes: CBAS is a Medi-Cal benefit; eligibility is determined by Medi-Cal managed care plans or county offices, not by CBAS program directly. Asset and income limits are Medi-Cal limits, not CBAS-specific. Search results do not contain current Medi-Cal asset/income thresholds. Minimum age is 18 per Health Net provider documentation. Phone number (Eldercare Locator) is for general senior services information; primary application is through Medi-Cal (1-800-300-1506 per search results or county DHCS offices).

programs.programName: Health Insurance Counseling and Advocacy Program (HICAP)

verified.notes: HICAP is an active program as of 2026. Phone number confirmed from official CMS/HHS government source. Age, income, and asset requirements not specified in available search results. Program appears to serve Medicare beneficiaries generally without stated eligibility restrictions beyond Medicare enrollment, but authoritative documentation of specific eligibility criteria was not retrieved.

programs.programName: Multipurpose Senior Services Program (MSSP) Caregiver Support

verified.notes: MSSP is a Medi-Cal waiver program administered by California Department of Aging. Age requirement is 60+ per official CDA source. No income or asset limits found in search results; program eligibility based on Medi-Cal status and nursing home care need. Phone number 1-800-677-1116 is Eldercare Locator from official CDA site for seniors outside California; for California residents, contact local MSSP provider directly. Program remains active as of 2026.

programs.programName: California Senior Legal Services (via Legal Services Inc. / Area Agencies)

verified.notes: Age requirement (60+) confirmed via California Department of Aging official source. Income and asset limits not disclosed in search results or official sources retrieved. Phone number 1-800-677-1116 is the Eldercare Locator for seniors outside California per CA Dept of Aging; local Area Agencies on Aging handle county-level services. Specific income/asset eligibility criteria for Legal Services program not found in authoritative sources provided. Recommend contacting local AAA directly for current eligibility thresholds.

verified.notes: SSP is a state supplement to federal SSI; eligibility criteria (age, income limits) are determined by federal SSI rules administered by Social Security Administration, not by California SSP program itself. Asset limits shown are federal SSI limits that apply to SSI/SSP recipients. Official California CDSS source (https://cdss.ca.gov/inforesources/ssi-ssp) confirms SSP eligibility follows SSI criteria but does not list specific thresholds. Phone number for SSI/SSP applications should be obtained from Social Security Administration (1-800-772-1213) rather than state agency. Search results do not contain SSP-specific age requirement, income limits, or official application phone number.

verified.notes: CBAS is a Medi-Cal benefit; eligibility is determined by Medi-Cal Managed Care Plans or the LA Medi-Cal Field Office. Income and asset limits are not specified in CBAS program documentation—they follow Medi-Cal eligibility rules, which vary by aid code and plan. Search results do not contain countable asset limits specific to CBAS. The phone number provided (1-800-677-1116) is the Eldercare Locator for services outside California; official CDA CBAS pages do not list a direct application phone number. For current asset/income limits, contact your Medi-Cal plan or local field office.
